title: 60-Second Lead Response for Restaurants
metaDescription: Done-for-you 60-second lead response for restaurants. Catering inquiries, private events, and reservations answered in under a minute, in your voice.
excerpt: Every catering inquiry, private event request, and booking question gets a personal reply in under 60 seconds, in your voice, with your booking link.

sections.intro:
In a restaurant, the difference between a booked private event and a lost one is usually minutes. A catering lead comes in through your contact form at 2pm, but you are on the line, prepping for service, or sitting down with a vendor. By the time you reach a quiet moment at 9pm, that lead has already messaged three other restaurants, and two of them replied before dinner.

The 60-Second Lead Engine is the wedge offer in the Ayothedoc AI Operating System. We install a done-for-you workflow that answers every new lead in under a minute, in your voice, with the right booking link or menu attached. You do not learn new software. You do not change your inbox. The system reads the lead, drafts the reply, and sends it while you are on the floor.
sections.fourCFit:
This page sits in the Capabilities layer of your AIOS. Capabilities are the done-for-you workflows that draft, route, summarize, and follow up on your behalf. The 60-Second Lead Engine is the first Capability we install because speed to lead is the single highest-leverage fix in food service.

To work well, this Capability leans on the other three layers:

  • Context: your restaurant's voice, your catering minimums, your private dining capacities, and which questions you always get asked.
  • Connections: your inbox, your contact form, your reservation system, and your calendar, so the reply uses live availability.
  • Cadence: a same-day nudge if the lead goes quiet, and a second follow-up two days later, without you remembering to do it.
sections.whatDoneLooksLike:
When the install is complete, here is the artifact you own and the service level it runs on:

  • Every new lead from your website form, catering page, or shared inbox gets a personal reply in under 60 seconds, 24 hours a day.
  • The reply is written in your voice, references the event type the guest mentioned, answers the two or three questions you get most often, and includes your booking link or a request for the missing details you need.
  • Leads are tagged by type (catering, private event, reservation, press, vendor) so the right ones rise to the top of your day.
  • A short daily digest lands in your inbox each morning with the leads that came in overnight, what was promised, and which ones need a human reply from you.
  • If a lead does not respond, the system follows up once on day one and once on day three, then stops.
sections.howWeInstall:
The install is the same three phases for every Ayothedoc client.

  1. Audit (free, about 10 minutes). We look at where your leads come from, how long replies take today, and which questions you answer over and over. Run the audit to see if this fits your restaurant.
  2. Install (10 business days). We capture your voice from past replies, write the response templates for each lead type, connect the form and inbox, and pressure-test the system with real leads before you go live.
  3. Operate (ongoing). We run the system, watch the replies, and add one new automation per week, often a follow-up sequence, a deposit reminder, or a post-event review request. See plans for what Operate includes.
sections.expectedResults:
Grounded ranges based on restaurants we have installed for:

  • Lead response time drops from a typical 4 to 24 hours down to under 60 seconds for the first reply.
  • Reply-to-booking conversion on catering and private event inquiries usually improves 20 to 40 percent, because you are the first one in the inbox.
  • Owners and managers get back 5 to 12 hours a week that used to go to inbox triage, lead chasing, and writing the same email for the tenth time.
  • Standing guarantee: if your AIOS does not recover 40 or more hours a month across the business, we keep working for free until it does.
sections.faq:
Will the replies sound like a robot wrote them?

No. We train on your past replies and the way you actually talk to guests. Most owners cannot tell which replies were drafted by the system and which they wrote themselves. You also see and approve the templates before anything goes live.

What if a lead asks something the system does not know?

The system answers what it is confident about, then hands the message to you with a one-line summary and a suggested reply. It will not guess on pricing, dietary questions, or anything that needs your judgment.

Do I have to switch reservation systems or my POS?

No. We are tool-agnostic and work with what you already use. The AIOS sits on top of your current inbox, contact form, and calendar. If you ever stop working with us, you keep the workflows and the templates.
